mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM t_order WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) FROM t_order WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM t_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(actual_amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_order WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) AND create_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT activity_id AS activityId, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) AS soldStock FROM (SELECT activity_id, total_amount, quantity FROM t_seckill_order_0 WHERE status = 1 UNION ALL SELECT activity_id, total_amount, quantity FROM t_seckill_order_1 WHERE status = 1) t GROUP BY activity_id

SELECT activity_id AS activityId, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) AS soldStock FROM (SELECT activity_id, total_amount, quantity FROM t_seckill_order_0 WHERE status = 1 AND activity_id = #{activityId} UNION ALL SELECT activity_id, total_amount, quantity FROM t_seckill_order_1 WHERE status = 1 AND activity_id = #{activityId}) t GROUP BY activity_id

SELECT DATE(order_time) AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM (SELECT order_time, total_amount FROM t_seckill_order_0 WHERE status = 1 AND order_time >= #{startDate} UNION ALL SELECT order_time, total_amount FROM t_seckill_order_1 WHERE status = 1 AND order_time >= #{startDate}) t GROUP BY DATE(order_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, activity_id, seckill_product_id, sku_id, product_name, seckill_price, quantity, total_amount, status, order_time, pay_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, address_id, update_time, alipay_product_code, wechat_product_code FROM (SELECT id, order_no, user_id, activity_id, seckill_product_id, sku_id, product_name, seckill_price, quantity, total_amount, status, order_time, pay_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, address_id, update_time, alipay_product_code, wechat_product_code FROM t_seckill_order_0 WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} UNION ALL SELECT id, order_no, user_id, activity_id, seckill_product_id, sku_id, product_name, seckill_price, quantity, total_amount, status, order_time, pay_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, address_id, update_time, alipay_product_code, wechat_product_code FROM t_seckill_order_1 WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}) t LIMIT 1
